title: bunium lendneri
intro: Bunium lendneri, also known as Lesser Burnet, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bunium lendneri include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin irritations.
